// Default products shown even when no vendors exist
export const DEFAULT_PRODUCTS = [
  { _id: 'default_1', name: 'Fresh Tomatoes', price: 40, description: 'Farm-fresh organic tomatoes', category: 'Vegetables', stock: 50, negotiable: true, discountMin: 5, discountMax: 15, sustainabilityScore: 9, images: ['https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1546470427-1f7b8b1f4f5a?w=400&q=80'], vendor: { shopName: 'Green Valley Farm', whatsapp: '919876543210' }, isDefault: true },
  { _id: 'default_2', name: 'Organic Apples', price: 120, description: 'Sweet and crunchy Kashmiri apples', category: 'Fruits', stock: 30, negotiable: true, discountMin: 5, discountMax: 10, sustainabilityScore: 8, images: ['https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1570913149827-d2ac84ab3f9a?w=400&q=80'], vendor: { shopName: 'Fresh Fruits Hub', whatsapp: '919876543211' }, isDefault: true },
  { _id: 'default_3', name: 'Pure Cow Milk', price: 60, description: 'Fresh cow milk delivered daily', category: 'Dairy', stock: 20, negotiable: false, discountMin: 0, discountMax: 0, sustainabilityScore: 7, images: ['https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1563636619-e9143da7973b?w=400&q=80'], vendor: { shopName: 'Dairy Direct', whatsapp: '919876543212' }, isDefault: true },
  { _id: 'default_4', name: 'Handmade Pottery', price: 350, description: 'Beautiful hand-painted clay pottery', category: 'Handicrafts', stock: 15, negotiable: true, discountMin: 10, discountMax: 20, sustainabilityScore: 10, images: ['https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1565193566173-7a0ee3dbe261?w=400&q=80'], vendor: { shopName: 'Artisan Crafts', whatsapp: '919876543213' }, isDefault: true },
  { _id: 'default_5', name: 'Basmati Rice 5kg', price: 280, description: 'Premium long-grain basmati rice', category: 'Food', stock: 100, negotiable: true, discountMin: 5, discountMax: 12, sustainabilityScore: 6, images: ['https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1536304929831-ee1ca9d44906?w=400&q=80'], vendor: { shopName: 'Grain & More', whatsapp: '919876543214' }, isDefault: true },
  { _id: 'default_6', name: 'Banana Bunch', price: 35, description: 'Fresh yellow bananas from local farm', category: 'Fruits', stock: 60, negotiable: false, discountMin: 0, discountMax: 0, sustainabilityScore: 9, images: ['https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1571771894821-ce9b6c11b08e?w=400&q=80'], vendor: { shopName: 'Fresh Fruits Hub', whatsapp: '919876543211' }, isDefault: true },
  { _id: 'default_7', name: 'Cotton Kurta', price: 450, description: 'Handwoven pure cotton kurta', category: 'Clothing', stock: 25, negotiable: true, discountMin: 5, discountMax: 15, sustainabilityScore: 8, images: ['https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1610030469983-98e550d6193c?w=400&q=80'], vendor: { shopName: 'Local Weaves', whatsapp: '919876543215' }, isDefault: true },
  { _id: 'default_8', name: 'Fresh Spinach', price: 25, description: 'Pesticide-free green spinach', category: 'Vegetables', stock: 40, negotiable: false, discountMin: 0, discountMax: 0, sustainabilityScore: 10, images: ['https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1576045057995-568f588f82fb?w=400&q=80'], vendor: { shopName: 'Green Valley Farm', whatsapp: '919876543210' }, isDefault: true },
];

export const CATEGORY_IMAGES = {
  'Food': 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1546069901-ba9599a7e63c?w=400&q=80',
  'Vegetables': 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1540420773420-3366772f4999?w=400&q=80',
  'Fruits': 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1610832958506-aa56368176cf?w=400&q=80',
  'Electronics': 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1498049794561-7780e7231661?w=400&q=80',
  'Clothing': 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1445205170230-053b83016050?w=400&q=80',
  'Handicrafts': 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1606722590583-6951b5ea92ad?w=400&q=80',
  'Dairy': 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1563636619-e9143da7973b?w=400&q=80',
  'Other': 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1472851294608-062f824d29cc?w=400&q=80',
};

export const NEARBY_VENDORS = [
  { _id: 'v1', shopName: 'Green Valley Farm', category: 'Vegetables', description: 'Organic vegetables grown locally', distance: 0.8, trustScore: 4.8, whatsapp: '919876543210', img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1542838132-92c53300491e?w=400&q=80' },
  { _id: 'v2', shopName: 'Fresh Fruits Hub', category: 'Fruits', description: 'Seasonal fruits directly from farms', distance: 1.2, trustScore: 4.6, whatsapp: '919876543211', img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1488459716781-31db52582fe9?w=400&q=80' },
  { _id: 'v3', shopName: 'Dairy Direct', category: 'Dairy', description: 'Pure dairy products every morning', distance: 2.1, trustScore: 4.9, whatsapp: '919876543212', img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1550989460-0adf9ea622e2?w=400&q=80' },
  { _id: 'v4', shopName: 'Artisan Crafts', category: 'Handicrafts', description: 'Handmade local art and crafts', distance: 3.4, trustScore: 4.7, whatsapp: '919876543213', img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1606722590583-6951b5ea92ad?w=400&q=80' },
];
